headline.text: L1 new Oreo aligner installed and tested before completing *3× clean/swab protocol* — trial product scrapped, cleaning completed overnight.

summary: New equipment trial on L1 S3 bypassed FSQA protocol initially; Jorel and Kathleen intervened, three-clean cycle completed by 02:04. Separate sanitation gaps: lock left on S2 belt after clean, S2 floor heavy-wash incomplete pending Monday, and curtain breach at L1 pack area patched by 2nd shift.

food_safety.title: 1,800 beads on new aligner chains — foreign material control
food_safety.summary: New Oreo aligner equipment uses 10 chains with 180 beads each; Joseph Scott counted all 1,800 beads pre- and post-trial to prevent loss into product zone.
food_safety.status: Resolved — all 1,800 beads accounted for after trial; 3 extra beads removed to standardize strand count.

sanitation.title: New Oreo aligner installed before 3× clean/swab protocol completed
sanitation.summary: Equipment cleaned once and ATP-tested before Jorel flagged missing Listeria/Salmonella/EB swabs and two additional clean cycles required by new-equipment policy.
sanitation.status: Resolved — third clean and ATP completed at 02:04; trial product scrapped per Jorel and Kathleen.

sanitation.title: Construction debris in pack area — metal, concrete dust on floor
sanitation.summary: New pack configuration work (drilling, conduit cutting, bolt cutting) left metal pieces, wires, and concrete dust; level 4 clean with sticky rollers required before Monday production.
sanitation.status: In progress — sticky roller and debris removal started 2nd shift, level 4 cleaning underway 3rd shift.

sanitation.title: Curtain gap at pack area — pest control breach
sanitation.summary: Jorel flagged section of plastic curtain with large gap and damage near new pack configuration; potential pest entry point.
sanitation.status: Resolved — Conner taped gap at 21:17, then patched curtain sections along floor by 17:51.

sanitation.title: S2 pack area floor heavy wash incomplete — no air fitting for foamer
sanitation.summary: Level 4 clean on S2 merge system completed except heavy floor wash; team scrubbed and mopped but could not locate air fitting to plug in foamer.
sanitation.status: Open — heavy wash deferred to Monday per Joseph Scott and Victor Romero.

sanitation.title: Lock left on S2 packing belt after level clean
sanitation.summary: Contractor found lockout lock still installed on MM packing belt post-clean; Katya removed and flagged leads on lock removal protocol.
sanitation.status: Resolved — lock removed by Katya; follow-up with leads requested.

opportunities.text: Consider adding new-equipment intake checklist visible to production and maintenance — today's aligner trial started before FSQA 3× clean/swab protocol was complete.
Review S2 pack area floor-wash tooling — today's level 4 clean could not locate air fitting for foamer, deferring heavy wash to Monday.
Add lockout/tagout removal step to L1 level-clean signoff checklist — lock left on S2 belt after clean, discovered by contractor.
